about.title: About Me
about.description: Systems Engineer and Full Stack Developer with experience building corporate web applications using React, TypeScript, and .NET. Currently working on enterprise projects for HP, developing scalable frontend interfaces and microservices integrated with SQL Server. Experienced in cloud environments (AWS and Azure), CI/CD pipelines, and Agile (Scrum) teams. Focused on writing clean, maintainable code and building scalable solutions for high-impact products.
about.achievement_1: Successfully adapted to a global corporate environment with high technical standards.
about.achievement_2: Maintained project continuity despite contractor changes, ensuring consistent performance and responsibilities.
about.achievement_3: Optimized code to improve application efficiency and performance.
about.achievement_4: Contributed to deployment stability by applying CI/CD best practices.

jobs.description: Development and maintenance of corporate web applications using React 18, TypeScript and .NET Core microservices integrated with SQL Server.
items: Develop and maintain corporate web applications using React 18 and TypeScript
Implement user interfaces using Veneer (HP Design System) for consistent and scalable frontend components
Develop and maintain microservices using .NET Core integrated with SQL Server
Participate in Agile Scrum ceremonies: Daily Standups, Sprint Planning, Reviews and Retrospectives
Manage source code using Git and GitHub in a collaborative development environment
Participation in cloud migration toward Azure
Implement automated deployments through CI/CD pipelines

jobs.description: Agile development team (3-week sprints) building a services platform with multiple features.

list.title: SimpleService
list.description: Services platform with catalog, shopping cart, Stripe payment gateway, Firebase authentication and admin panel.

list.title: VideoGames App
list.description: SPA that consumes the RAWG API to explore video games, with filters, sorting and custom game creation.
